details.test: Task 1: Cheapest small residential floor-plan package to quote
Task 2: Book earliest afternoon commercial consultation slot
Task 3: Create 3-property bundle with drone & twilight, save and add to quote
Task 4: Choose annual hosting plan for >=25 tours under $60/mo and proceed
Task 5: Save shortest residential 3D+floorplan tour under 3 minutes to favorites
Task 6: Filter and add cheapest matching residential package to cart
Task 7: Submit quote request for 8-location franchise rollout
Task 8: Apply single-property promo to cheapest eligible residential package and proceed to checkout summary
Task 9: Save recent article about preparing home for virtual tour to reading list
